mentions.note: Cruise operator Cramer prefers over oil-proxy plays; buy for fundamentals through thick and thin, not geopolitical noise.
At $78 feels like $100; Torstein Hagen leadership excellent. Own don't trade; long-term cruise/leisure player with strong fundamentals.

Premium cruise operator with 5 consecutive industry awards (Condé Nast); obsessed with quality, contrarian strategy (entered Egypt 2011, Great Lakes innovation). Up 10% since last earnings despite consumer headwinds. Torstein Hagen is industry leader.
Down 2.7%; even upscale cruise line with premium clientele showing weakness; travel momentum slowing.
Only cruise line recommended right now; insulated due to higher-margin ships and less-disrupted routes; avoids travel disruption and oil exposure better than Carnival/Royal Caribbean.
